message:
fix(pipelines): fix missed non-null assertion in useTogglePipeline

The previous fix missed one `existing!` non-null assertion in the
useTogglePipeline hook mock mode branch. Changed to use nullish
coalescing `?? mockPipelines[0]` for safety, consistent with the
other mutation hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
